method: market scan -> mispricing score -> stock-vs-LEAPS choice -> ranked picks

rows.name: SIVE equity on CPO laser bottleneck
rows.thesis: Sivers may be an underfollowed upstream InP DFB laser supplier to emerging silicon-photonics and external-light-source architectures, with the market still valuing it far below better-known downstream photonics names.
rows.bottleneck_layer: InP laser and external light source capacity
rows.value_capture_layer: Specialized upstream laser supplier with ecosystem leverage
why_missed: market attention focused on larger optical names
customer and supply-chain links are not obvious from headline financials
invalidations: customer relationships fail to convert into volume

mispricing.candidate_name: SIVE equity on CPO laser bottleneck
mispricing.explanation: SIVE equity on CPO laser bottleneck scores 81.6/100 (critical) on mispricing plausibility. The strongest weighted drivers are hiddenness, recognition gap, catalyst clarity. The least supportive signals are valuation nonlinearity, crowding inverse. This screen is a structural ranking aid, not live options pricing.
